channel.title: Home on Dade City Christian Church
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Dade City Christian Church

item.title: About
item.description:
Service Preview

Pre-service

When you first arrive you will be meet by our greeters who will welcome you. If you need anything at all, ask one of these greeters and they can help you find what you’re looking for. Feel free to have a cup of coffee before entering the Worship Center.

Worship

Our music portion usually lasts from 10-15 minutes to start the service. We have a blended song service which means we sing hymns and contemporary worship music with lyrics shown on a screen behind the stage. We usually stand together and sing, but if you have physical limitations please don’t feel bad about sitting.

item.title: Growth Track
item.description:
God has an incredible purpose for your life, and the Growth Track is designed to help you connect with that purpose. Together, we will help you Discover what God has in store for you, Develop your talents and knowledge and unleash you to make Disciples.

Discover

We believe that God has created you with a unique purpose in mind. We also believe discovering what that purpose is can be an irritating and long process, so we want to help.

item.title: Meet Our Team
item.description:
Elders

  • Brad Hopkins
  • Jason Long
  • Dennis Piety
  • Grant Piper
  • Shayne Trebour
  • Keith Smith
  • Bill Williams

Deacons

  • Chris Carrillo
  • Fred George
  • Wes Merchant
  • Jesse O’Berry
  • Josh Southard
  • Marcel Tayamen
  • Scott Tyree
  • Jack Van Allen
  • Rick Walker

item.title: Next Steps
item.description:
We believe that everyone has a purpose that comes straight from God. We also believe that each person’s purpose can be encouraged, developed, and maybe even discovered by joining God’s people in what we call church. The first place to begin discovering and developing your God-given purpose in life is at our Next Steps Class. In this class we navigate through four sections:

  1. How God sees us
  2. How God saves us
  3. How God structures us
  4. How God sends us

Ad the end of this 2 hour class, you will have a clear view of how to pursue your purpose here at Dade City Christian Church. We offer these classes on the 1st Sunday of every month starting at 9am.

item.title: Values and Beliefs
item.description:
Core Beliefs

  1. We believe that Jesus Christ is the Messiah, the Son of the Living God, God in human form. We believe that the virgin-born Son of God died for our sins, was buried, rose from the dead, and is coming again. We believe He is both fully God and fully man. Philippians 2:5-7; John 14:9; John 8:58; John 1:1, 14; Colossians 2:9

  2. We believe that the Bible is the inspired Word of God. We believe God inspired the autographs (original writings) of Scripture and those autographs were consequently without error. Mark 12:36; John 14:26; 16:12-15; Acts 1:16; 1 Corinthians 2:12-13; 2 Timothy 3:16-17; 2 Peter 1:20-21

item.title: You Belong Here.
item.description:
Join Us This Weekend

No matter where you are on your spiritual journey, we would love for you to attend Dade City Christian. Our hope is that you will be encouraged and inspired when you come. To learn more about our Sunday morning worship experiences, you can plan your visit or visit the About Us page.

Become a Member

There are multiple opportunities to join Dade City Christian Church each month through our Growth Track, where you will Discover God, Develop your faith, and Disciple your circle. To find out more about Growth Track, or to sign up for an upcoming class, visit our Growth Track Page
